mapper.sql: id, title, type, cpu, memory, storage, base_price, total_duration, group_min_num, group_max_num, current_num, status, start_time, server_start_time, server_end_time, server_tutorial_url, admin_contact, sort_order, create_time, update_time, cover
mapper.select:
SELECT ga.id, ga.title, ga.cpu, ga.memory, ga.storage, ga.base_price, ga.total_duration, ga.current_num, ga.group_min_num, ga.group_max_num, ga.status, ga.start_time, ga.server_start_time, ga.server_end_time, ga.server_tutorial_url, IFNULL(ga.cover, '') AS cover FROM osh_group_activity ga
ga.type = 'server'
AND ga.status = #{status}
AND ga.status IN (1, 2)
ORDER BY ga.sort_order DESC, ga.create_time DESC

SELECT u.id AS user_id, u.username, u.nickname, u.avatar, gw.join_time, IF( gw.id = (SELECT MIN(gw2.id) FROM osh_group_work gw2 WHERE gw2.group_activity_id = #{groupActivityId}), TRUE, FALSE ) AS is_leader FROM osh_group_work gw LEFT JOIN osh_user u ON gw.user_id = u.id WHERE gw.group_activity_id = #{groupActivityId} ORDER BY gw.join_time ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO osh_group_work ( group_activity_id, user_id, order_id, actual_price, remaining_months, group_status, join_time, server_start_time, server_expire_time, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{groupActivityId}, #{userId}, #{orderId}, #{actualPrice}, #{remainingMonths}, #{groupStatus}, #{joinTime}, #{serverStartTime}, #{serverExpireTime}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE osh_group_activity SET current_num = #{currentNum}, status = #{status}, server_start_time = #{serverStartTime}, server_end_time = #{serverEndTime}, update_time = #{updateTime} WHERE id = #{id} AND current_num = #{currentNum} - 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO osh_group_order ( user_id, group_activity_id, group_work_id, order_no, price, base_price, remaining_months, status, pay_method, created_time, updated_time ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{groupActivityId}, #{groupWorkId}, #{orderNo}, #{price}, #{basePrice}, #{remainingMonths}, #{status}, #{payMethod}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, group_activity_id, group_work_id, order_no, price, base_price, remaining_months, status, pay_method, pay_time, created_time, updated_time FROM osh_group_order WHERE order_no = #{orderNo}

SELECT 'joined' AS source_type, gw.id AS group_work_id, ga.id AS activity_id, ga.title AS activity_title, gw.user_id, u.username, u.nickname, gw.actual_price, gw.remaining_months, gw.group_status, CASE gw.group_status WHEN 0 THEN '进行中' WHEN 1 THEN '已成团' WHEN 2 THEN '已取消/过期' ELSE '未知' END AS group_status_text, gw.join_time, gw.server_start_time, gw.server_expire_time, go.order_no, go.status AS order_status FROM osh_group_work gw LEFT JOIN osh_group_activity ga ON gw.group_activity_id = ga.id LEFT JOIN osh_user u ON gw.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN osh_group_order go ON gw.order_id = go.id
gw.group_status = #{groupStatus}
UNION ALL
SELECT 'initiated' AS source_type, gui.id AS group_work_id, NULL AS activity_id, '用户发起拼团' AS activity_title, gui.user_id, u.username, u.nickname, gui.custom_price AS actual_price, NULL AS remaining_months, gui.group_status, CASE gui.group_status WHEN 0 THEN '招募中' WHEN 1 THEN '已成团' WHEN 2 THEN '已取消/过期' ELSE '未知' END AS group_status_text, gui.initiate_time AS join_time, gui.server_start_time, gui.server_expire_time, go.order_no, go.status AS order_status FROM osh_group_user_initiated gui LEFT JOIN osh_user u ON gui.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN osh_group_order go ON gui.order_id = go.id
gui.delete_flag = 0
AND gui.group_status = #{groupStatus}
ORDER BY join_time DESC

SELECT id AS userId, username, nickname, avatar, status FROM osh_user
delete_flag = 0 AND status = 0
AND ( username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR nickname LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
ORDER BY CASE WHEN username = #{keyword} THEN 0 WHEN username LIKE CONCAT(#{keyword}, '%') THEN 1 WHEN nickname = #{keyword} THEN 2 WHEN nickname LIKE CONCAT(#{keyword}, '%') THEN 3 ELSE 4 END, id ASC
LIMIT #{limit}
